nasb.text: Water will flow from his buckets, And his seed will be by many waters, And his king shall be higher than Agag, And his kingdom shall be exalted.

esv.text: Water shall flow from his buckets, and his seed shall be in many waters; his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.

cnv.text: 必有水從他的桶中流出來， 他的後裔必在多水之處； 他的王必超過亞甲， 他的國度必被高舉。

ccb.text: 他们沐浴充沛的甘霖， 撒种于湿润的沃土。 他们的君王高过亚甲， 国度名震四方。
